evals.name: natural-language
evals.prompt: zip up the terraform folder for me
evals.expected_output: A verified zip in zipped/ excluding .terraform, .terraform.lock.hcl, sensitive tfvars; including starter_pack_category.auto.tfvars and terraform.tfvars.example

assertions.text: Ran create_final_schema.py for enterprise_rag_aiq category
Asked user for confirmation before creating zip
Zip file is in the zipped/ directory
Zip contains ai-accelerator-tf/ as top-level directory
.terraform/ directory is NOT in the zip
.terraform.lock.hcl is NOT in the zip
terraform.tfvars (with fake PII) is NOT in the zip
starter_pack_category.auto.tfvars IS in the zip
terraform.tfvars.example IS in the zip
Post-zip verification step was executed
